data.title: OpenAI backs child safety group’s AI ballot fight
data.description:
OpenAI and Common Sense Media, which disagreed on technology policy, announced on Friday that they will combine forces on a ballot proposal aimed at protecting children who use artificial intelligence chatbots in California. The two groups said they would drop separate proposals they had planned to put before California voters this November. Instead, they will […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/openai-backs-child-safety-groups-ai-ballot/

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer of 495.97 BTC Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 02:41, a total of 495.97 BTC, valued at approximately $44.86 million, was transferred from one anonymous address, beginning with 1eaLX, to another anonymous address, starting with 19qgw.

data.title: Crypto Capital Is Rewriting How Property Deals Happen in Europe
data.description:
Hundreds of high-net-worth investors are increasingly using cryptocurrency to purchase real estate across Europe, as new legal and financial frameworks make these transactions compliant, faster, and more accessible. What was once a niche experiment has evolved into a structured market supported by regulated fintech firms and legal specialists.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/crypto-capital-is-rewriting-how-property-deals-happen-in-europe/
